penalties.description: Loop appears positioned within 1-2mm of target mark

confidence_rationale: Clear visualization of most phases and timing. Loop positioning assessment limited by camera angle during placement - estimated 1-2mm deviation from mark based on frames 13-14.
cannot_determine: Exact mm deviation from mark due to camera angle during final positioning
technique_summary: Competent intermediate-level performance with smooth deployment and placement. Total time of 57 seconds falls within intermediate range (40-90s). Minor positioning penalty estimated.
improvement_suggestions: Focus on more precise positioning at the mark to eliminate deviation penalty
Practice could reduce total time from intermediate (57s) toward expert range (20-40s)
